---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DevArchitecture
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case would it enable? (e.g. "I'd like to…", "It would help if…")

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature or change you’d like.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you’ve thought about.

## Scope (optional)

- [ ] Backend / WebAPI
- [ ] Admin client (`clients/*`)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other: …

## Additional context

Optional: examples, mockups, or links to similar behavior in other projects.
